name: coding-discipline
description: Lean, firm guardrails for coding agents: spec sync plus risk-triggered design alignment, TDD, root-cause debugging, prioritized review, evidence-based verification, disciplined git, and context hygiene.

plugins.name: coding-discipline
plugins.description: Eight lean but firm skills, including spec-sync for durable intent and context-hygiene against stale documentation. They trigger only when their conditions match and stay strict once active. Includes a SessionStart discipline primer, passive local usage counting, and first-entry guide-doc seeding for CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md.
